site.title: c7xai — The Truth About Your Money
site.description: Old rules of money are broken. Here are the real ones. Inflation-adjusted, tax-aware financial clarity for India.

home.heroBody: Mutual funds show you 12%. After inflation (6%) and LTCG tax (12.5% above ₹1.25L), you keep 3.8%. Every calculator here shows the real number.
home.statNoSignup: No signups. No tracking. No PII.
home.sectionTitle: What do you want to know?
home.sectionSubtitle: Every number inflation-adjusted. Every tax accounted for. Zero marketing spin.
home.questionHowMuchKeep: How much do I actually keep?
home.methodSubtitle: Why our numbers are different — and more honest.
home.methodInflationBody: We use RBI's 10-year average inflation (6%), not the feel-good 4% headline number. Your money buys less every year — we account for that.
home.methodTaxBody: LTCG at 12.5% above ₹1.25L. New vs Old regime. Section 80C limits. Every deduction that applies to you — we apply it.
home.methodNoProductBody: We don't sell mutual funds, insurance, or FDs. No affiliate links. No commissions. The math just is what it is.
home.privacyTitle: All our math runs in your browser.
home.privacyBody: Zero data sent anywhere. No server. No database. No tracking. Every computation happens client-side — you can verify it yourself.
home.footerDescription: The truth about your money. Inflation-adjusted, tax-aware financial clarity for India.

truthIndex.title: The Truth Index
truthIndex.subtitle: Financial products are sold with big numbers. We show you what they actually mean after inflation, tax, and fees. Click any card to reveal the truth.
truthIndex.bottomNote: Every number on this page uses RBI 10-year average inflation (6%), current tax slabs, and real market data. Don't trust marketing — verify.

calculators.sipDesc: See actual returns after inflation and tax. Real numbers, not marketing.
calculators.emiDesc: Compare loan EMIs with the real total cost over the full tenure.
calculators.taxDesc: Old vs New regime side by side. Find which one actually saves you more.
calculators.fdDesc: Your FD's real return after tax and inflation. Usually lower than you think.
calculators.ppfDesc: Real PPF maturity after inflation. EEE tax benefit included.
calculators.swpDesc: Will your corpus survive a market crash? Simulate worst-case withdrawals.
calculators.fireDesc: When can you actually retire? Month-by-month freedom timeline.
calculators.goalDesc: Monthly SIP needed per goal. Know exactly what to invest and when.
calculators.hraDesc: How much HRA is tax-free? Section 10(13A) exemption.
calculators.npsDesc: Project your pension and corpus. See what 80C savings really build.
calculators.ctcDesc: Maximize in-hand salary. See where every rupee of your CTC goes.
calculators.salaryDesc: CTC to in-hand. Full breakup — basic, HRA, PF, tax — old vs new.
calculators.compoundDesc: See how compound interest really grows your money after tax and inflation.
calculators.accumulationDesc: Lump sum vs SIP — see which strategy wins after costs.
calculators.epfDesc: Project your EPF corpus with employer split and interest compounding.
calculators.gstDesc: Compute GST on any amount. CGST/SGST split for intra-state.
calculators.stepUpSipDesc: Annual SIP increase vs Regular compared. Step-Up wins every time.
calculators.termInsuranceDesc: How much cover do you need? Compare premiums and claim settlement ratios.
calculators.cryptoDesc: 30% flat tax + 1% TDS + inflation. Your real crypto return.
calculators.forexDesc: TCS, capital gains, and LRS limits — the real cost of investing abroad.
calculators.depreciationDesc: Total cost of owning a vehicle — fuel, insurance, loan interest, resale.
calculators.realEstateDesc: Stamp duty, capital gains, rental yield — the true cost of property.
calculators.simpleInterestDesc: Simple vs Compound side by side. See what compounding really costs you.

calcExplainer.inflationGap: The gap between green and red is what inflation silently steals.
